{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eye of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10692
|idx=50
|description="A dragon’s eyes are as deep as the cosmos, perceiving the laws of fate and overseeing the workings of order…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Before round start, 68.7% chance to summon Fate Shackles, preventing the enemy from acting for 1 round!
|hp=1788
|def=302
|atk=157
|rush=208
|gene1=Per orange or higher organ equipped, all ELMT DMG +18
Orange or higher organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} HP +70
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +140
|gene4=In Snail Arena, {race} RUSH +140
|gene5=Snail Arena, All ELMT RES +60
|gene7=In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
